summary: Iteration 55: Admin Vehicles Page - 3-column grid layout verified. Desktop shows 3 columns at 1920px, Tablet shows 2 columns at 768px, Mobile shows 1 column at 390px. VehicleCard redesign matches target: CHF price top-left, purple Détails button top-right, large 220px image with status dot and photo count, brand uppercase purple, model+year bold, feature badges (Places, Transmission, Fuel). Backend 100% pass (10/10 tests).

details.implementation: Uses useWindowDimensions with breakpoints: 3 cols at 1200px+, 2 cols at 768px+, 1 col below

details.price_header: CHF price at top-left with '/jour' below - PASS
details.vehicle_image: Large 220px height image with object-fit cover - PASS
details.status_dot: Green/red status dot at top-right of image - PASS
details.photo_count: Photo count overlay badge at bottom-left of image - PASS
details.brand_display: Brand in UPPERCASE purple text (e.g., 'BMW', 'MERCEDES-BENZ') - PASS
details.model_year: Model + Year in bold below brand (e.g., 'Serie 3 320d 2024') - PASS
details.feature_badges: 3 badges showing Places, Transmission, Fuel type - PASS
details.plate_number: License plate displayed at bottom - PASS

details.fields_displayed: Statut, Marque, Modele, Année, Prix, Places, Lieu, Plaque, Couleur, Chassis, Type, Transmission, Carburant, Description, Photos

details.filter_buttons: Tous (6), Disponible (6), Loue (0), Maintenance (0) - visible and functional

details.vehicle_data_structure: All required fields present (id, brand, model, year, price_per_day, photos, seats, transmission, fuel_type, status)

critical_code_review_comments: vehicles.tsx: Clean implementation using useWindowDimensions for responsive grid (3 cols at 1200+, 2 at 768+, 1 below)
VehicleCard.tsx: Well-structured component with proper styling for all elements (price header, image with overlays, brand/model, badges)
Image height of 220px provides good visual consistency across cards
Feature badges correctly derive labels from raw values (e.g., 'automatic' → 'Automatique')
data-testid attributes present on cards and edit buttons for testability

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 3-column grid and VehicleCard features verified

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 6 vehicles from agency
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin vehicles page (/agency-app/vehicles) displays 3-column grid on desktop (1200px+), 2 columns on tablet (768px+), 1 column on mobile. VehicleCard shows: CHF price top-left, purple Détails button top-right, large image (220px) with status dot and photo count, brand uppercase purple, model+year bold, feature badges. Login: admin-geneva@logirent.ch / LogiRent2024! via /admin-login, click 'Se connecter'.
